pipeline_stages.name: Ingest
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Pull every sol cat page from IMDA's PSG pre-approval guide; extract every question and required-feature row.

pipeline_stages.name: Label & deduplicate
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Tag each requirement to one of 10 ERP modules, then merge near-duplicates across sol cats.

pipeline_stages.name: Cluster into capabilities
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Group merged requirements into capabilities — coherent vendor-qualification units.

pipeline_stages.name: Cross-validate
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Independently confirm each capability against reference ERPs (NetSuite, Odoo, ERPNext, SAP, Oracle, Microsoft) plus encyclopedic sources.

pipeline_stages.name: Enrich (sector + tier)
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Score each capability for relevance per sector (within the sectors the module applies to) and per SME tier.

pipeline_stages.name: Author vendor questions
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Generate the vendor-facing checklist row per capability, format-locked to IMDA Type 1 (R1–R8 contract).

pipeline_stages.name: Audit & validate
pipeline_stages.plain_description: Run deterministic audits (P0 + P1 rules) against the produced checklist, sol-cat join, and use-case pipeline.
